_note: Recipe campaign products. Categories pool products by use-case; recipe_type_map picks categories per recipe based on slug/title keywords; recipe_overrides force a specific product list per recipe slug. Matcher caps output at 3 products per recipe. Affiliate URLs built via lib/affiliate_resolver.build_affiliate_url with AMAZON_ASSOCIATES_TAG env var.

dog-feeding.display: VIVAGLORY Silicone Pet Food Mat (24"x16", waterproof)
dog-feeding.blurb: Raised-edge silicone catches every spill and drip. Wipes clean in seconds — saves the floor from homemade-stew splash zone.

dog-feeding.display: Outward Hound Fun Feeder Slow Bowl (Large/Regular)
dog-feeding.blurb: Maze-pattern slow feeder — turns 30-second meal scarfing into a 10-minute calm chew. We use the turquoise Large for Nalla.

dog-feeding.display: Elevated Stainless Steel Dog Bowl Set with 6-Height Adjustable Stand
dog-feeding.blurb: Raised stand reduces neck strain on bigger dogs. The two stainless bowls (1.5 gal food / 3 gal water) sit secure — no scoot-across-the-kitchen routine.

molds.blurb: Bone-shape silicone — pops out frozen treats and baked biscuits cleanly. Dishwasher safe. The mold I batch-freeze yogurt bites in.

food-storage.display: IRIS USA WeatherPro Airtight Pet Food Container (25 lb / 33 Qt)
food-storage.blurb: Foam-sealed lid + snap latches keep kibble and homemade-batch leftovers fresh for weeks. Wheels make it actually pleasant to roll out.

slow-cooking.display: Crock-Pot 6-Quart Programmable Cook & Carry Slow Cooker
slow-cooking.blurb: Set 8 hours, walk away, come back to bone broth. Locking lid means the broth makes the trip from counter to fridge without redecorating the kitchen.
